description_long: This is a modern bungalow situated on a sloped terrain, featuring a multi-level design with a prominent overhanging roof and a mix of large and small rectangular windows. The structure is primarily composed of light gray exterior walls, with a darker gray roof that extends over several sections, creating sheltered outdoor spaces. The rear facade showcases a wide array of windows and a raised deck supported by columns, providing an elevated outdoor area. The front includes a garage extension and a main entrance area, both integrated into the overall massing. The side elevations reveal additional windows and a stairway leading to the deck, emphasizing the split-level nature of the building. The bungalow's design is characterized by clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a harmonious integration with the sloped landscape.
description: A modern, multi-level bungalow with a gray overhanging roof, large windows, and a raised deck, set on a sloped terrain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage extension, main entrance, and overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, fewer windows, and the slope of the terrain.
description_view_2: Rear view with extensive windows, a raised deck supported by columns, and stair access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stairway to the deck and additional windows along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped rear windows and scattered side windows
